query: Šar Planina Marathon cross country ski race Popova Šapka

videos.title: Sapka Fest 2015 - Bike & Running
videos.description:
Mountain festival “Popova Shapka’ 2015-Bike & Running, three-day event from August 28th till August 30th 2015 on the slopes of Popova Shapka, Shar Mountain.
The aim of the event is recreational and competitive. It is a bike tour in which licensed and unlicensed racers from our country and regional countries such as the Balkans and Europe are taking part. Bike races include an XC race (day one) and marathon (day two) as well as mountain running which is an athlete race.

videos.title: HIGH SCARDUS ULTRA 2022 (4K)
videos.description:
High Scardus Ultra is an international and green-friendly trail running event following the route towards the highest peak in Sharr – Tito Peak. It is the first ever race in the Balkans between two states: Kosovo and North Macedonia.
The race is a joint cross-boundary project involving local communities, which offers unforgettable adventure in an unspoiled natural setting – a true disconnect from the stress of modern society.
The inaugural first edition of the High Scardus Ultra was held between September 2-4, 2022, and it was a great opportunity for the runners from many countries to take part in the first multi-stage ultra race in the Western Balkans with available distances ranging from 20km, 50km and up to 105km.
For more, follow the link: https://highscardusultra.com/ 

Produced by TEMA for Ministry of Trade of Kosovo/KIESA, in cooperation with High Scardus Ultra, Utalaya Foundation, and TREX.

videos.title: Balkon3: Sharski Vodi Marathon -- Macedonia's gold
videos.description: Adrenaline, breathtaking nature, delicious beans. Sharski Vodi (Waters of Shar Mountain) marathon was held for the seventh time on the slopes of Shar Mountain on 30th June 2013. The mountain biking marathon takes place in a unique landscape with many streams flowing by the trail, rare natural beauty ideal for recreational mountain biking or hiking. Although the weather forecast was rather unfavorable, more than 250 cyclists and nature lovers turned out at the start of the marathon at Popova Sapka ski centre. Almost all of them managed to ride the 95 kilometers to the finish in the village of Vrutok, where you can see the source of the Vardar river. The winners of the marathon race received medals near Vrutok springs and the event was symbolically completed with a pot of traditional baked beans. The marathon has become a tradition and organizers are hoping to see cyclists from the whole region taking part in the future.
